item.description:
# N1KO-STATE v1.0.17
**Settings redesign & gauge dashboard polish** — unified settings cards, live previews, and a cleaner gauges popover.
**设置页重设计 & 仪表盘优化** — 统一卡片组件、实时预览，以及更清爽的仪表盘弹窗。
---
## Download / 下载
| Asset | Description | |-------|-------------| | **N1KO-STATE.dmg** | Universal binary (Apple Silicon + Intel). Drag to Applications. | | **N1KO-STATE-sparkle.zip** | In-app updater archive used by Sparkle. Normal manual installs should use the DMG. | | **appcast.xml** | Sparkle update feed for automatic update checks. |
**Install note:** If macOS blocks the ad-hoc signed app on first launch, run `xattr -cr /Applications/N1KO-STATE.app` in Terminal. You can also right-click **N1KO-STATE.app** → **Open** on first launch.
**安装说明：** 如果首次打开被 macOS 拦截，优先在「终端」执行 `xattr -cr /Applications/N1KO-STATE.app`。也可以右键 **N1KO-STATE.app** → **打开**（仅首次需要）。
---
## What's New / 本版本内容
### Settings / 设置
- Redesigned settings UI with in-card section headers, pill selectors, and row-based advanced controls. - Language picker now includes System, English, Simplified Chinese, and Traditional Chinese. - Appearance picker now includes System, Light, and Dark. - Menu Bar page keeps Metrics + Live Preview side by side, with Appearance full width below. - Live previews use the real menu-bar renderer and the actual popover dashboard.
- 设置页采用卡片内标题、分段选择器与行式高级控件。 - 语言支持：跟随系统、English、简体中文、繁體中文。 - 外观支持：跟随系统、浅色、深色。 - 菜单栏页保持「指标 ∥ 实时预览」上排 + 「外观」全宽下排。 - 实时预览使用真实菜单栏渲染器与真实弹窗仪表盘。
### Gauges Popover / 仪表盘弹窗
- Compact in-ring details with shorter labels and values (Run, Stress, 13.7G, 1d14h, etc.). - Neutral card surfaces, spring ring animation, and tighter gauge grid spacing. - Header summary strip and fixed settings/quit icon hit targets.
- 环内详情更紧凑（运行、压力、13.7G、1d14h 等）。 - 中性卡片底色、弹簧环动画、更紧凑的网格间距。 - 顶栏摘要条，设置/退出按钮固定 28×28 点击区域。
### Versioning / 版本同步
- Updated app version metadata to `1.0.17` / build `117`.
- 应用版本元数据更新为 `1.0.17` / build `117`。
---
## Full changelog / 完整变更
**Full changelog:** [v1.0.17 tag](https://github.com/baogutang/N1KO-STATE/releases/tag/v1.0.17)
